ques: Retrieve the final score and a brief summary of the latest NBA game played by the Los Angeles Lakers as reported on ESPN.
answer: In their latest game (West Semifinals Game 4, May 12, 2026), the Los Angeles Lakers LOST to the Oklahoma City Thunder 115-110. Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 35 points and Chet Holmgren hit a tiebreaking dunk with 32.8 seconds left as OKC swept the series 4-0, eliminating the Lakers; Austin Reaves led L.A. with 27 points.
